root.not_found_desc: Head back to your portfolio to continue.
root.site_description: Invest, track your performance, measure your impact. A clear, responsible experience.

landing.meta_title: Seedow — The ESG audit of your savings
landing.meta_desc: Enter your portfolio, get a transparent ESG audit: weighted score, coverage rate, honest blind spots. No investment pitch.
landing.og_desc: Transparent ESG audit. Enter your portfolio, see what it really funds.
landing.subtitle: The ESG audit of your savings.
landing.manifesto_text: Your savings tell a story. We read it out loud.
landing.demo_desc: Type a ticker, see what your portfolio would say. A taste of the full audit.
landing.demo_data_note: {{name}} · demo data, full audit on your real portfolio.
landing.demo_unknown: Unknown ticker in demo. Try AAPL, TSLA, TTE, MC or NESN.

pillars.1_body: Weighted ESG score on your real portfolio. No simulation, no marketing ranking.
pillars.2_body: Every figure shows its source and date. The methodology is public and reproducible.
pillars.3_body: Uncovered holdings stay visible. An honest audit beats a misleading average.

landing.method_desc: Sector exclusions, weighted ESG scores, explicit coverage rate, time-stamped sources. Every figure can be traced back to its public source.

faqs.a1: Seedow audits your existing portfolio through an ESG lens. You enter your holdings (ISIN or ticker, amount or %), we compute a weighted average score, a data coverage rate and surface the blind spots. No investment pitch — just reading.
faqs.q2: Where do the ESG scores come from?
faqs.a2: Data comes from public providers (Yahoo Finance ESG, MSCI ESG when available). Every score shows its source and date. Uncovered holdings are flagged as ‘unauditable’ — not hidden.
faqs.a3: The audit is free. Later, Seedow will offer a paid realignment service (actionable recommendations, monitoring). The audit itself will stay open.
faqs.a4: No bank data is stored. You enter your holdings manually. You can export or delete your account at any time.

landing.final_title_a: Your savings deserve to be read.
landing.footer_copy: © 2026 Seedow — Editorial reading of your savings.

certificate.meta_desc: Personal edition of the Seedow impact certificate.
certificate.no_portfolio: No active portfolio — no certificate to issue.
certificate.subtitle: Impact certificate · Personal edition
certificate.methodology_body: Indicators are computed from the actual portfolio composition, weighted by the ESG exposures of underlyings (exclusion filter, best-in-class selection, composite E/S/G score). CO₂ avoided is an indicative estimate derived from ESG scores, not a regulatory figure.

reglages.meta_desc: Manage your profile, investment preferences and notifications.
reglages.title: Settings
reglages.subtitle: Profile, preferences, transparency.
reglages.auto_recalc_note: Any change triggers an automatic recalculation of your portfolio through the full pipeline (exclusions → best-in-class → constrained Markowitz optimization → conviction tilts).
reglages.privacy_desc: Your data stays strictly confidential. You can export or delete all your information at any time.
reglages.market_data_desc: Prices are refreshed automatically every business day at close. You can force an immediate update here.
reglages.no_runs: No run logged yet. Force a refresh above to start tracking.
reglages.pipeline_desc: Six traceable steps: profiling, investable universe, sector exclusions, best-in-class ESG filters, constrained Markowitz optimization (ESG floor, risk budget, weight bounds), then pre-optimization tilt of expected returns based on your causes. The interactive simulator and detailed documentation are on the dedicated page.
reglages.engine_version_desc: Methodology v1.1 · E/S/G pillars weighted by causes, real carbon intensity, source traceability. Reviewed quarterly.

market_data.title: Market data
market_data.desc: Prices are automatically refreshed every business day at close. You can force an immediate update here.

health.title: Data health
health.empty: No logged executions yet. Force a refresh above to start tracking.

pipeline.title: Construction pipeline
pipeline.desc: Six traceable steps: profiling, investable universe, sector exclusions, best-in-class ESG filters, constrained Markowitz optimization (ESG floor, risk budget, weight bounds), then pre-optimization tilt of expected returns according to your causes. The interactive simulator and detailed documentation are on the dedicated page.

sources.title: Data sources
sources.esg: ESG scores by pillar (E/S/G): MSCI ESG Research, Sustainalytics, ESG Book, Yahoo Sustainability
sources.carbon: Carbon intensity (gCO₂e/€ invested): Trucost, ISS ESG, Yahoo Sustainability — with date and provider stored per asset
sources.sfdr: SFDR classification: issuer prospectuses (iShares, Lyxor, Amundi)
sources.prices: Prices and volatilities: Yahoo Finance, 5-year historical series, covariances recalculated weekly

esg_composite.title: Composite ESG score, weighted by your causes
esg_composite.desc_1: The ESG score ranges from 0 to 100.
esg_composite.desc_2: Instead of a fixed 40/40/20 average, the E, S, and G pillars are reweighted based on the causes you activate in your preferences. The score thus reflects what really matters to you.
esg_composite.pillar_e: Environment (E) — scope 1-2-3 CO₂ emissions, carbon intensity, water, waste, renewables exposure.
esg_composite.pillar_s: Social (S) — human rights, working conditions, gender equality, product safety, community relations.
esg_composite.pillar_g: Governance (G) — board independence, executive compensation, tax ethics, transparency, anti-corruption.
esg_composite.fallback_note: When a pillar is not published for an asset, we automatically fall back on the global ESG score (documented fallback).
esg_composite.mapping_e: Climate, Biodiversity, Circular economy → boost the E pillar
esg_composite.mapping_s: Human rights, Gender equality → boost the S pillar
esg_composite.mapping_sg: Ethical tech → boost the S and G pillars
esg_composite.mapping_note: Without an active cause, we revert to the neutral 40/40/20 weighting. The more causes you activate related to a pillar, the more its weight in the composite score increases.
esg_composite.portfolio_desc: It is the weighted average of the composite score of each line by its weight. A default ESG floor of 70 is imposed on the optimizer; if it finds no feasible solution, the floor is relaxed and an esg_floor_relaxed flag is raised for transparency.
esg_composite.warning: An ESG rating remains an estimation dependent on the quality of published data. Each asset stores the score source (esg_score_source) for auditability.

carbon.title: Carbon footprint: heuristic + real
carbon.desc: Two indicators deliberately coexist while real data coverage reaches 100% of the portfolio:
carbon.avoided: Avoided CO₂ (heuristic) — indicative estimation derived from the composite ESG score. Practical for comparing two portfolios, not a regulatory figure.
carbon.intensity: Real carbon intensity — weighted average of gCO₂e/€ invested/year on the portion of the portfolio actually covered by a provider (carbon_intensity_* fields with source and update date). A coverage indicator is displayed in the methodology page.
carbon.coverage_title: Low coverage? Heres what to do
carbon.coverage_low: < 30% — rely on avoided CO₂ heuristic, real intensity is not representative.
carbon.coverage_medium: 30–70% — indicative reading, to be cross-referenced with composite ESG.
carbon.coverage_high: ≥ 70% — reliable figure, usable for internal reporting.

optimization.title: Constrained Markowitz optimization
optimization.desc: Maximization of mean-variance utility with constraints: sum of weights = 1, weights ≥ 0, floor per asset, ceiling per asset and class, risk budget (target volatility), composite ESG floor. Expected returns are tilted upstream according to your causes (single-tilt pre-optimization) — no double-tilt at the exit to avoid biasing the efficient frontier.

version.title: Engine version
version.desc: Methodology v1.1 · E/S/G pillars weighted by causes, real carbon intensity, source traceability. Revised quarterly.
